meta.title: Czech Insolvency Decision Tree
meta.description: Machine-readable decision tree for AI agent: debtor stage classification and creditor action selection
meta.notes: Some leaf-node conditions (e.g., oddlužení 5-year term, § 98 30-day deadline) pending advisor confirmation. See N4C.1-INDEX.md for open questions.

debtor_stage_classifier.description: Given facts about the debtor, determine the current insolvency stage

check_upadek.question: Does the debtor meet the § 3 IZ úpadek conditions?

conditions.label: Hrozící úpadek (threatened insolvency — only debtor may file)

check_filing_status.question: Has an insolvenční návrh been filed?

conditions.label: Mandatory filing obligation triggered for legal entities and OSVČ (§ 98 IZ)
Insolvenční řízení zahájeno — automatic stay of enforcement
Rozhodnutí o úpadku issued — správce appointed, claim filing deadline set
Moratorium — enforcement suspended, debtor continues operations
Prohlášení konkurzu — asset liquidation, going concern abandoned
Oddlužení — personal bankruptcy for natural persons + eligible OSVČ

check_konkurz_phase.question: What is the current phase of konkurz?

check_reorganizace_phase.question: What is the current phase of reorganizace?

check_oddluzeni_phase.question: What is the current phase of oddlužení?

stage_HROZICI.label: Hrozící úpadek — threatened insolvency; debtor may file preventively

stage_PRE_FILING.label: Úpadek established — mandatory filing obligation active (§ 98 IZ)

stage_RIZENI_PROBÍHA.label: Insolvenční řízení probíhá — proceedings active, awaiting court decision on úpadek

stage_MORATORIUM.label: Moratorium active — enforcement suspended; debtor operates normally

stage_KONKURZ_SOUPIS.label: Konkurz — soupis majetkové podstaty (estate inventory) in progress

stage_KONKURZ_ZPENEZNENI.label: Konkurz — zpeněžení majetkové podstaty (asset realization) in progress

stage_KONKURZ_ROZVRH.label: Konkurz — rozvrhové usnesení (distribution order) issued; payments to creditors

stage_KONKURZ_ZRUSEN.label: Konkurz ukončen — proceedings closed; unsatisfied claims survive (§ 244)

stage_REORGANIZACE_PLAN.label: Reorganizace — reorganizační plán being prepared; debtor in possession

stage_REORGANIZACE_PLNENI.label: Reorganizace — plan approved; implementation in progress; business continues

stage_ODDLUZENI_SPLATKY.label: Oddlužení — splátkový kalendář (payment schedule) in progress

stage_ODDLUZENI_OSVOBOZENI.label: Oddlužení — completed; osvobození od zbytku dluhů (debt discharge) granted (§ 414 IZ)

creditor_action_selector.description: Given the debtor's insolvency stage, determine the creditor's accounting and tax actions

check_claim_filed.question: Has the creditor filed a claim (přihláška pohledávky) in ISIR?

conditions.note: No recovery possible in proceedings; consider other legal routes

check_claim_recognized.question: Was the claim recognized (uznána) at přezkumné jednání?

conditions.note: Must file incidental dispute (incidenční spor) within 30 days or claim is lost

check_op_status.question: Has zákonná OP been created on this receivable?

conditions.note: Create immediately — reduces taxable income in current year

check_dph_correction.question: Is the creditor a plátce DPH AND was the original supply subject to DPH AND are the parties unrelated?

conditions.mechanism: Issue opravný daňový doklad; book MD 343 / D 648 (or 311)
conditions.warning: § 44 ZDPH REPEALED 2024-01-01 — use §§ 46–46a; transitional rules unclear — see AMBER-06

check_write_off.question: Is write-off of the receivable justified? (insolvency trigger confirmed under § 24 odst. 2 písm. y) ZDP)

conditions.tax_status: Daňově uznatelné — § 24 odst. 2 písm. y) ZDP

conditions.note: Keep zákonná OP; monitor ISIR for distribution order

open_questions.question: Does přihlášení pohledávky in ISIR count as 'zahájení soudního řízení' for § 8a odst. 3 Act 593/1992 (100% OP from filing)?
open_questions.impact: If yes: creditor can create 100% zákonná OP on day of ISIR filing. If no: must wait 18/30 months unless separate court action filed.

open_questions.question: § 44 ZDPH transitional provisions — do pre-2024 receivables use old § 44 or new §§ 46–46a?
open_questions.impact: Critical for receivables invoiced before 2024-01-01 where debtor only entered insolvency after that date.

open_questions.question: Is debt forgiven under reorganizace plan taxable income for the debtor (DPPO)?
open_questions.impact: If yes: reorganizace plan may trigger tax bill that undermines viability.
